statusLegend.proven: Generated package imported, rendered, submitted, approved, and persisted at least one representative value when applicable.
statusLegend.partially_proven: Generated package imported and rendered the control, but value entry or persistence was not fully exercised.
statusLegend.schema_supported_but_untested: Normalized schema or export anatomy exists, but no focused generated runtime package has proved it yet.
statusLegend.runtime_sensitive: Export-backed anatomy exists but depends on environment metadata, uploads, advanced sources, or unresolved runtime behavior.
statusLegend.deferred: Do not generate by default until a focused export/import proof exists.

requiresAutofillOrSummaryVariables: identity/organization/location/cost-center pickers when direct native persistence is not proven
notes: Stage 5 metadata/tag controls were intentionally skipped.
Stage 6 proved raw lookup-to-text persistence stores the internal local row ID; use attrs.addition[] or explicit summary variables for readable persistence.
Direct list/listref child-row persistence is not proven; persist a summary or generate a separate child list after export-backed proof.

controls.reason: Submitted Request Title and persisted it to Title.
controls.requiredFutureTest: None for basic single-line text.

controls.reason: Rendered on submit and review pages; reviewer notes textarea rendered.
controls.requiredFutureTest: Exercise persistence of long text in a later form-focused package if needed.
controls.recommendedFallback: input for short text only.

controls.reason: Rich text editor rendered after loading, but no rich text value was entered or persisted.
controls.requiredFutureTest: Enter formatted rich text and verify review rendering plus persistence/fallback field shape.
controls.recommendedFallback: textarea until rich text value persistence is fully proven.

controls.reason: Quantity accepted numeric input and persisted to Decimal field.
controls.requiredFutureTest: None for basic decimal input.

controls.reason: Unit Price rendered with USD formatting, accepted input, supported calculation, and participated in persistence.
controls.requiredFutureTest: Multi-currency formatting variants can be tested separately.
controls.recommendedFallback: input_number with currency label if formatting is not required.

controls.reason: v2 accepted 25.00%, displayed it as 25.00% on the review task, participated in calculation, and persisted it to the list view.
controls.requiredFutureTest: None for basic percent input.
controls.recommendedFallback: input_number with percent label.

controls.reason: Dropdown radio rendered in v1 but was not filled in the runtime submission.
controls.requiredFutureTest: Enter/select a value and verify text persistence in a choice-focused package.
controls.recommendedFallback: input text field.

controls.reason: Checkbox rendered, Laptop was selected, review page showed it, and ContentList persisted a JSON-like array string.
controls.requiredFutureTest: Study cleaner multi-choice list-view display if required.
controls.recommendedFallback: single text field with comma-delimited choices.

controls.reason: Switch rendered and persisted OFF/ON-compatible Bit value shape.
controls.requiredFutureTest: None for basic boolean switch.

controls.reason: Needed By date rendered and persisted to Datetime field.
controls.requiredFutureTest: Date-time mode can be isolated if required.
controls.recommendedFallback: input text only when native date is unavailable.

controls.reason: v2 accepted from/to dates and displayed them on the approval task; list-view persistence was not exposed in the selected display fields.
controls.requiredFutureTest: Expose both mapped Datetime fields in a later package/list view and verify persisted from/to values.
controls.recommendedFallback: two separate datepicker controls.

controls.reason: v2 accepted 10:30:00, displayed it on the approval task, and persisted it to the list view.
controls.requiredFutureTest: None for basic time input.
controls.recommendedFallback: input text time field.

controls.reason: v3 rendered the file-upload control, accepted yeeflow-upload-stage3-test.txt, submitted successfully, displayed the uploaded file on the submitted request and reviewer task, completed approval, and created the text persistence record.
controls.requiredFutureTest: Only binary ContentList/data-list persistence remains deferred; workflow form upload usage is proven.
controls.recommendedFallback: textarea for external file link when binary upload is not needed.

controls.reason: v3 rendered the icon/image upload control, accepted yeeflow-upload-stage3-test.png, showed the image preview on the submitted request and reviewer task, completed approval, and created the text persistence record.
controls.requiredFutureTest: Only binary ContentList/data-list persistence remains deferred; workflow form image upload usage is proven.
controls.recommendedFallback: file-upload or text URL when image preview is not required.

controls.reason: Requester resolved to current user in v1/v4; v4 also proved an editable single-select identity picker by selecting Renger from Yeeflow, displaying it on the submitted request and reviewer task, completing approval, and creating the text-summary record.
controls.requiredFutureTest: Multiple-user picker behavior can be isolated later.
controls.recommendedFallback: text field storing display name.

controls.reason: v4 rendered the department picker and opened the tenant organization selector with the Default department available. Selection did not retain after OK in this sandbox, so value persistence remains environment-sensitive.
controls.requiredFutureTest: Retest with a known selectable department export or inspect required retention attrs from a working manual export.
controls.recommendedFallback: text field or lookup to packaged department list.

controls.reason: v4 rendered and opened the location picker; the sandbox returned no matching location data, so selection and persistence were not exercised.
controls.requiredFutureTest: Retest in a tenant with configured location metadata or use a focused export-backed working location picker.
controls.recommendedFallback: text field.

controls.reason: v4 rendered and opened the cost center picker; the sandbox cost center table had no available rows, so selection and persistence were not exercised.
controls.requiredFutureTest: Retest in a tenant with configured cost centers or use a focused export-backed working cost-center picker.
controls.recommendedFallback: text field or packaged lookup list.

controls.reason: Stage 5 intentionally skipped for now; requires source/categoryId values and lower priority than lookup/list controls.
controls.requiredFutureTest: Resume only if category metadata is provided by export.
controls.recommendedFallback: text field or packaged lookup list.

controls.reason: Stage 5 intentionally skipped for now; same unresolved metadata source/category risk as metadata, plus multi-select value shape.
controls.requiredFutureTest: Resume after single metadata proof.
controls.recommendedFallback: checkbox or text list.

controls.reason: v6 proved internal packaged lookup: source list imported with sample rows, lookup picker opened, Standard Laptop was selected, selected value displayed on submit/submitted/reviewer pages, addition mappings populated Product Code/Product Category/Unit Price, approval completed, and ContentList created a target row. Raw lookup-to-text persistence stores the internal local row ID, so persist display text via addition/summary fields unless an ID is intended.
controls.requiredFutureTest: Lookup-list/relation lookup remains separate; multi-select lookup can be isolated later.
controls.recommendedFallback: radio/input when source list is small.

controls.reason: Intentionally deferred in v6 because AI Training uses relation-name addition shapes and including it with single lookup/listref would blur failure boundaries.
controls.requiredFutureTest: Isolated lookup-list package using an internal packaged source list.
controls.recommendedFallback: lookup single-select or packaged checkbox list.

controls.reason: v6 proved list/listref workflow-form usage with variables.listref and child controls: rendered table, added one row, edited Product/Quantity/Unit Price/Line Note, submitted, displayed row values on submitted and reviewer pages, completed approval, and persisted a text summary through ContentList. Direct child-row-to-data-list persistence remains out of scope.
controls.requiredFutureTest: Isolate direct child-row persistence or separate child data-list creation if needed.
controls.recommendedFallback: textarea summary or separate child data list.

controls.reason: Not included in v6; embedded data-list display should be isolated after lookup/listref structures are stable.
controls.requiredFutureTest: Separate display-only source-list package.
controls.recommendedFallback: dashboard/data-list navigation instead of embedded display.

controls.reason: Schema-supported but not present in AI Training control inventory and no generated runtime proof exists.
controls.requiredFutureTest: Stage 7 only with a focused signer export.
controls.recommendedFallback: identity-picker plus approval action.

controls.reason: Stage 5 intentionally skipped for now; normalized schema exists but AI Training did not include a tag control and source behavior is lower priority than lookup/list controls.
controls.requiredFutureTest: Retest only with a focused tag export or explicit need.
controls.recommendedFallback: text field or checkbox choices.

controls.reason: v2 star rating rendered, accepted a 3.5 value, displayed on the approval task, and persisted to the list view.
controls.requiredFutureTest: None for basic star rating.
controls.recommendedFallback: input_number.

controls.reason: v2 URL input accepted https://example.com/runtime-test, rendered as an open link on the approval task, and persisted as a list-view link.
controls.requiredFutureTest: None for basic URL input/display.
controls.recommendedFallback: input text URL field.

controls.reason: v1 subtotal and v2 percent-based calculation both updated correctly; v2 calculated 200 * 25% = 50, displayed on review, and persisted.
controls.requiredFutureTest: Formula variants can be isolated as needed.
controls.recommendedFallback: readonly number field with deferred calculation.

controls.reason: AI Training includes tabs as layout controls, but generated tab behavior is not runtime-proven.
controls.requiredFutureTest: Separate layout-control package after value controls.
controls.recommendedFallback: section/card containers.

controls.reason: Submit and approval actions completed successfully.
controls.requiredFutureTest: None for simple approval workflow.

controls.reason: Flow history rendered on the review task page.
controls.requiredFutureTest: None for simple workflow history.
